'''Tash Scrambas''' was the father of [[Pello Scrambas]].

==Biography==
Scrambas served as [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] aboard the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Qel-Droma]]''. During the [[Alderaan Ascendancy Contention]], he refused to take any sides and cooperated with [[Jorus C'baoth]] in negotiating a truce.

The day the crisis ended, Scrambas's 15-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-old son, Pello, joined the [[Alderaanian armed forces]].
